= API Reference (AsciiDoc)

This document declares its metadata via AsciiDoc header attributes.
The metadata card surfaces the curated fields in a consistent shape
with the Markdown YAML/TOML form. The `:custom-attr:` lands in the
"extras" list because the curated set does not include it.

== Endpoints

* `GET /things` — list everything
* `POST /things` — create a thing
